[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Lasmiditan Succinate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Lasmiditan Succinate</strong> 目前有 <strong>7 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Lasmiditan Succinate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：RAYVOW is indicated for the acute treatment of the headache phase of migraine attacks, with or without aura in adults.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>migraine disorder（99.9%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（99.9%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（99.6%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（99.6%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（99.5%）</li>
<li>sciatic neuropathy（96.5%）</li>
<li>monogenic obesity（88.8%）</li>
<li>obesity disorder（87.6%）</li>
<li>obsolete hypertelorism (disease)（86.4%）</li>
<li>hypervitaminosis（86.2%）</li>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（84.7%）</li>
<li>frontorhiny（82.7%）</li>
<li>proximal 16p11.2 microdeletion syndrome（80.0%）</li>
<li>lesion of sciatic nerve（79.6%）</li>
<li>anxiety（75.0%）</li>
<li>tendinitis（73.7%）</li>
<li>myositis fibrosa（71.5%）</li>
<li>idiopathic granulomatous myositis（71.5%）</li>
<li>trigeminal autonomic cephalalgia（68.3%）</li>
<li>headache disorder（66.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/lasmiditan-succinate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
